entity.label: Jokmeam
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Gathering of the people, a city of Ephraim, which was given with its suburbs to the Levites (1 Chr. 6:68). It lay somewhere in the Jordan valley (1 Kings 4:12, R.V.; but in A.V. incorrectly “Jokneam”).

nodes.label: Jokmeam
nodes.description: Gathering of the people, a city of Ephraim, which was given with its suburbs to the Levites (1 Chr. 6:68). It lay somewhere in the Jordan valley (1 Kings 4:12, R.V.; but in A.V. incorrectly “Jokneam”).

verses.text: And Jokmeam with her suburbs, and Bethhoron with her suburbs,
